zh.Moulton, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾莫爾頓
zh.Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England: 英國波藍德波 白 桑德斯

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lambert de Multon II of Egremont於大約1191年出生在英國林可爾史爾莫爾頓時，他的父親Thomas de Multon II27歲，母親Sarah de Flete18歲。他於大約1213年與Amabel Lucy結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1247年11月27日之前在英國波藍德艾格雷蒙特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lambert de Multon II of Egremont于大约1191年出生在英国林可爾史爾莫爾頓时，他的父亲Thomas de Multon II27岁，母亲Sarah de Flete18岁。他于大约1213年与Amabel Lucy结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1247年11月27日之前在英国波藍德艾格雷蒙特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Multon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moulton
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Lambert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is from an Old French given name of Germanic origin, from land ‘land, territory’ + beorht ‘famous’. This was introduced to Britain by the Normans, but its frequency in Britain in later centuries owed something to immigrants from the Low Countries, and it continued in occasional use into the 18th century at least. St Lambert of Maastricht was a 7th-century saint who aided St Willibrord in his evangelical work.

variants.name: Lammert
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is from an Old French given name of Germanic origin, from land ‘land, territory’ + beorht ‘famous’. This was introduced to Britain by the Normans, but its frequency in Britain in later centuries owed something to immigrants from the Low Countries, and it continued in occasional use into the 18th century at least. St Lambert of Maastricht was a 7th-century saint who aided St Willibrord in his evangelical work.

variants.name: Lamprecht
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is from an Old French given name of Germanic origin, from land ‘land, territory’ + beorht ‘famous’. This was introduced to Britain by the Normans, but its frequency in Britain in later centuries owed something to immigrants from the Low Countries, and it continued in occasional use into the 18th century at least. St Lambert of Maastricht was a 7th-century saint who aided St Willibrord in his evangelical work.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Lambert de Multon II of Egremont was born about 1191, in Moulton, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Thomas de Multon II, was 27 and his mother, Sarah de Flete, was 18. He married Amabel Lucy about 1213. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died before 27 November 1247, in Egremont, Cumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lambert de Multon II of Egremont est né environ 1191, à Moulton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Multon II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Sarah de Flete, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Amabel Lucy environ 1213. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé avant 27 novembre 1247, à Egremont, Cumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lambert de Multon II of Egremont um 1191 in Moulton, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Multon II 27 und seine Mutter Sarah de Flete 18. Er hat um 1213 Amabel Lucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb vor 27. November 1247 in Egremont, Cumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lambert de Multon II of Egremont è nato il circa 1191 nel Moulton, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Multon II, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Sarah de Flete, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Amabel Lucy circa 1213. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì prima del 27 novembre 1247, nel Egremont, Cumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lambert de Multon II of Egremontが約1191年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアモウルトンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Multon IIは27歳，母Sarah de Fleteは18歳であった。約1213年にAmabel Lucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1247年11月27日以前にイギリスクウンバーランドエグレモントで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lambert de Multon II of Egremont(이)가 대략 1191년 영국 링코실르 모우턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Multon II(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah de Flete(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1213년 Amabel Lucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1247년 11월 27일 이전 영국 c벌랜드 그렘트에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1191–before 27 November 1247: ойролцоогоор 1191 он–1247 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 27–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lambert de Multon II of Egremont nasceu aproximadamente 1191, em Moulton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Multon II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Sarah de Flete, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Amabel Lucy aproximadamente 1213. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu antes 27 de novembro de 1247, em Egremont, Cumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lambert de Multon II of Egremont родился около 1191 г. в местности моултон, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Multon II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah de Flete, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Amabel Lucy около 1213 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер перед 27 ноябрь 1247 г. в местности эгремонт, кумбирланд, Англия.

sm.about 1191–before 27 November 1247: e tusa o le 1191–a'e le'I oo le 27 Novema 1247

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lambert de Multon II of Egremont nació aproximadamente 1191, en Moulton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Multon II, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Sarah de Flete, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Amabel Lucy aproximadamente 1213. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió antes de 27 de noviembre de 1247, en Egremont, Cumberland, Inglaterra.
